body:
# Ember's Kiln

Ember's Kiln is a mod for Minecraft 1.20+ that adds a new furnace type; a kiln!
The kiln can be used to quickly smelt glass, clay, and stone items!

The kiln is crafted by surrounding a furnace on all cardinal directions with bricks in a crafting grid.

## Credits
The animated texture is based on a texture from Lily's [Animated Furnace](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/animated-furnace) resource pack.
